text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are having lunch
together one day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I'll get luscious, bouncy skin if I eat
this Luscious, Bouncy Pudding?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh! Then what am I supposed to do about my
skin? It's as dry and rough as a paper talisman!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The philosophy of feng shui tells us dry skin is a
surefire sign that great misfortune is just around
the corner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru seems to be having skin
problems...
